svg.text: TPC-H Final Comparison — PG vs pg_duckdb vs pg_yaap
PG and YAAP are single-pass 120s timings. pg_duckdb uses default parallelism, LOAD 'pg_duckdb', 30s timeout, restart-and-retry until first success.
Total comparison counts each timeout as 120s. Final totals: PG 447.908s, pg_duckdb 95.754s, pg_yaap 30.787s.
0s to 30s, 5s major ticks · right-hand tags show slowest/fastest multiplier (worst ÷ best; timeout = 120s)
Right-hand labels show multiplier = slowest_time / fastest_time (timeout = 120s when a run timed out).
DuckDB values come from the final default-parallel restart-and-retry summary; PG and YAAP values are the updated single-pass timings. This chart matches the visual style of tpch_pg_vs_yaap.svg.
